practice.task: Create a student object with name, age, and grade properties. Print it as JSON.
practice.title: Student Object
practice.code:
// YOUR CODE HERE
// Create a student object and print it

solutionCode:
const student = { name: "Alice", age: 20, grade: "A" };
console.log(JSON.stringify(student));
meta:
TITLE: Student Object
TASK: Create a student object with name, age, and grade.
EXPECTED_OUTPUT: {"name":"Alice","age":20,"grade":"A"}
HINT: Use object literal syntax { key: value }.

variants.label: correct
variants.code:
const student = { name: "Alice", age: 20, grade: "A" };
console.log(JSON.stringify(student));

variants.label: different-key-order
variants.code:
const student = { grade: "A", name: "Alice", age: 20 };
console.log(JSON.stringify(student));
